name: goldenage-ai
description: GoldenAge AI — senior-friendly AI companion + guardian ecosystem (static web app hosted on Vercel).

scripts.build: echo 'Static site — no build step required'
scripts.dev: echo 'Open index.html in a browser, or run: npx serve .'

//: This file is here so Vercel recognises the project as a Node-capable
package and activates Edge Middleware (middleware.ts at root).
Without it, Vercel treats the project as pure HTML and ignores the
middleware. There are no runtime dependencies — the static files in
this repo are served as-is, and middleware.ts runs at the edge.
